g.text: Orange — Writer: append frames to WAL
Green — Reader: check index, fall back to .db
Purple — Checkpoint: copy WAL → main DB
Blue — WAL Index: O(1) page→frame lookup
KEY: Readers NEVER block Writers in WAL mode
wal_index[page_id] | int | latest frame# for page
frame_count | int | total frames in WAL
Lookup: O(1) — direct array index by page_id
Checkpoint safe up to: min(all active max_frame)

text.tspan: Always consistent — safe to read directly

g.text: Each page: 4096 bytes, managed by buffer pool
